HeroSection.h2: Development is just one step. It's essential to deeply understand the end-user's needs to achieve excellence. Nice to meet you, my name is Lucas de Paula.

JobExperiencesSection.title: My experiences
JobExperiencesSection.subtitle: Navigating diverse environments with adaptability and professionalism.

job-1.cargo-1-description: I worked as a lead front-end developer, contributing significantly to various projects for outsourced companies in different sectors and using a variety of technologies. <break></break> I started by collaborating with Axis Mobfintech, where I developed projects from scratch and maintained private libraries exclusive to the company. Among the highlighted projects, I worked on the real-time presentation of purchase dashboards and the registration of POS (points of sale). All projects at Axis were developed with React and TypeScript, allowing for an interactive and responsive interface. <break></break> Additionally, I collaborated with Spdata on two hospital management projects using Vue.js, where I integrated with government systems, facing technical and regulatory challenges. <break></break> One of my biggest contributions was for Versatus HPC, where I developed most of the Kosen Energy project, focused on weather forecasting and pricing. This project had a very specific niche, and the biggest challenge was the decoupled creation of the report screen elements, which included various charts and filters. Each screen was designed to be dynamically generated via API, allowing all front-end components to be created modularly.
job-1.cargo-2-description: I took on the challenge of delving into the UX world, and in some projects, I acted as a UX Designer, restructuring screens to improve usability and align the design with the needs of end users. In Axis Mobfintech projects, I made UX adjustments, but the biggest highlight was my role in the Versatus HPC project. There, I suggested and implemented significant changes to the application, which were highly praised by the product owner, especially for how the changes optimized the user experience and brought visible improvements in navigability.

job-2.cargo-1-description: I contributed to the development of NxSuite, a SaaS chatbot platform that optimizes the creation of automated customer service flows, efficiently connecting businesses and customers. I started on the real-time customer service team, developing a dynamic interface with React JS and WebSocket, using the Socket.IO library. In addition to development, I implemented layout improvements, resulting in a more intuitive and efficient service experience for users. <break></break> Later, I was promoted to the integration and data teams, where I led the implementation of integrations with external partner APIs, such as VTEX, and developed interfaces that supported viewing and uploading large volumes of data. During this time, I mentored two intern developers, monitoring their progress until they were promoted to junior developers. <break></break> I performed a significant refactor of the project's code, applying the functional paradigm and using methodologies such as DRY and KISS, focusing on pure functions and immutability. Additionally, I introduced the Atomic Design methodology into the project, improving component consistency. I also identified and corrected a behavior that caused numerous unnecessary re-renders when using the Ant Design library, optimizing the application's performance. Furthermore, I found an SQL Injection vulnerability in the system and contributed directly to its resolution, ensuring greater data security for users.

MyStackSection.title: My Stack
MyStackSection.subtitle: Committed to staying up-to-date with the latest development trends and techniques.
MyStackSection.reactjs: React is a library for native and web user interfaces.
MyStackSection.typescript: TypeScript extends JavaScript by adding types to the language.
MyStackSection.nextjs: Used by some of the world's largest companies, Next.js allows you to build high-quality web applications with the power of React components.
MyStackSection.nodejs: Node.js® is a free, open-source, cross-platform JavaScript runtime environment that enables developers to create servers, web applications, command-line tools, and scripts.
MyStackSection.aws: AWS is a cloud computing services platform offered by Amazon.
MyStackSection.jest: Jest is a powerful JavaScript Testing Framework with a focus on simplicity.

ContactSection.subtitle: Open to proposals, programming questions, and if you've worked with me, leave a message to be added as a testimonial.

If you change the locale to German, the URL is localized accordingly (/de/pfadnamen).
